titleStmt.title: SII 9.204: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 204. (A.R. No. 259 of 1905.) ON THREE FACES OF A PILLAR SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE DARK ROOM OF THE TRIPURANTAKESVARA TEMPLE AT TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 47, Śubhakṛit, Kār tika, śu. pañchadaśī, Bṛihaspativāra. Sōma-grahaṇa. The date is irregular. Kārttika, śu. 15 in Śubhakṛit corresponded to A.D. 1122 October 17 Tuesday, not Thursday, as stated, nor was there a lunar eclipse on that day. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva who, after his conquest of the Pāṇḍyas, Kuntala, Yādavas, Koṅkaṇas, Sēvaṇa, Māḷava, Pallikōṭe, Nallūru, Pāñchāla, Vidarbha and Kaliṅga, is stated to have been ruling from Jayantīpura. He made a gift of several villages (named) for the service of the god Tripurāntakēśvara, for imparting education, for feeding Brāhmans, ascetics and other pilgrims and for repairs to the temple. The inscription is engraved in characters of a later period than the one to which it purports to belong.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛ thvīva
llabha mahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷaka narapāḷabhayaṁkara rājagaja
kēsarī sāmaṁttahariṇaśārdūla pā
ṁḍyatūlacaṁḍamāruta
kāḷiyagōpāḷa kuṁttaḷasēnākṛ
tāṁtta yādavabalajaladhivaḍabā
nala koṁkaṇaraṇāṁkkaṇabhayaṁkkara sēva
ṇaraṇabhīṣaṇa saptamāḷavasaptārcimasiṁ
dhuvanakaṁddakuṁddāḷa pallikōṭenallūra
tanabhadrāṁggavidrāvaṇa caccatavā na
Ayyanayyaphaṇīṁdrasauparṇa varggarakṣa
rākṣasarāṣṭrakāladaṁḍa pāṁcāḷa
hariṇapaṁcānana vidarbhavanitā
vidhvaṁsana kaḷiṁggasphuḷiṁggadhārādhara cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravarddhamānaṁ jayantīpurada ne
levīḍinūḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttaṁ nijavikramavarṣadā nā
lvattēḍaguneyi śubhakṛtsaṁvatsara kārtika
śuddha paṁcadaśi bṛhaspativārada
ṁdu sōmagrahaṇagūḍida ma
hākārtikaparbbanimittadiṁ śrīparvva
tapūrvvadvārada śrītripurāṁtta
kadēvara Aṁgaraṁggabhōgakkaṁ mattaṁ Ā
cāryyatapōdhanaAdhyayanaśuśrūṣa
brāhmara Aśanācchādanakkaṁ Ayvattu nā
kku mānasara Atithi Abhyāgata tapō
dhanara grāsakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnō
dhdhārakkaṁ Ī tīrtthadoḷaguḷḷakāḍaśai

svayaṁbhudēvagaḷa madhyā
hnanivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa mo
ṭṭavāḍināḍoḷaga
ṇa pultalapaḻu kavala
kuṁṭṭa rācagoṁḍa śatakō
ṭicinnānipalli mucca
lāguḍi muṭṭuva
lu kaṁbhamupāḍu Oṁṭṭa
pāḍu mrānepalli gu
ḍapāṁtaḍi naḍivrālame
ḍapi mudivēmu guṭṭa
lapalli mariyaṁpāḍu
duvvali kōḍūrggaḷa
Eṟavayoḷagaṇa ka
mārulāla maṁddabrahma
pallimaccapurapaṭa
ramalupalli ponnako
ṟu laṁjyadona maṁkula
kuṁṭṭa raccavēmu caṁ
dravīḍaṁ komaraṁpāḍu
guṟrapugāla kolakuṁṭapa
lli ceṟunāḍūrggaḷuṁ kū
mūnūṟa voḷagaṇa gaṁ
ḍito Ubhayaṁtaḍapa
li Aṁddu malapāḍu pa
pasapulēṟu pinnapasapu
lēṟu biṭṭalapāḍu A
naguṁḍāmu veligaḍu U
ppalapāḍu ṟapali
madumaṁcci pālūrgga
ḷuṁ Aṁttu beraśi 44 Ū

rggaḷuṁ catussīme sahita dhārāpū rvva
kaṁ māḍibiṭṭaru . Ī dharmma svadharmma
di pratipāḷisidavargge śrīśaila tripurā
ṁtakatīrttha gaṁge vāraṇāsi kuru kṣētra va
rghyatīrtthaṁgaḷalu Uttamapātrada
li parassahasra dāna Ubhaya
mukhikapilādāna hiraṇyōdakadā
nagaḷaṁ māḍida phaḷamakku . Ī dharmmama
naḷida mahāpātakargge Ī tīrtthaṁga ḷa
lu gōbrāhmaṇa parassahasraṁ vadhe
yaṁ māḍida mahāpātakamakku
saṁrakṣakāḥ kalayatē tripurāṁttaka
sya tīrtthasya kōkilabilādhipabhairavēti
dēvī trilōkaviditē tripurē ka
rāḷī kāḷī śmaśānatalavāsinī bhadra
kāḷī . sādhāraṇaṁ sukṛtamētadaśē
ṣarājña rakṣaṁti yē śirasi taccara
ṇadvayaṁ mē . tannyāyamapyē
vati yē kila nāśayaṁtti bha
smībhavaṁtu lītanayatkṣa ṇā
. sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛ
pāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānētānbhāvinaḥ pā
rthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yāca
tē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vā yō harētā
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi
ḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
